quote: First learn the meaning of what you say, and then speak. – Epictetus
fact: The sound of E.T. walking was made by someone squishing her hands in jelly.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: I accidentally drank a bottle of invisible ink. Now I’m in hospital, waiting to be seen.
